subcodes.first_line: O Nabil Qabl-i-Karim! Hearken unto the shrill voice of the Most Exalted Pen from the direction of grandeur: verily, there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نبیل قبل کریم ان استمع صریر القلم الاعلی من شطر الکبریا انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
